project_type: AWS CDK with C# (.NET 8) - Infrastructure as Code for a serverless sleep audio pipeline
language: C# (.NET 8) for CDK stack, Python 3.12 for Lambda
build_system: dotnet CLI with MSBuild. Solution file at src/CdkBase.sln. CDK CLI via npx.
test_framework: xunit with Amazon.CDK.Assertions (Template.FromStack, FindResources, HasResourceProperties). Tests use serialized JSON assertion pattern.
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln. 2. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth (from repo root). 3. Verify ARCHITECTURE.md reflects changes.
setup_instructions: Build environment requires NODE_OPTIONS="" to workaround missing proxy-bootstrap.js. .NET 8 SDK and Node.js 22 are pre-installed.
environment_constraints: NODE_OPTIONS must be set to empty string for all dotnet/node commands due to missing /opt/amazon/kiro-agent/proxy-bootstrap.js. Network mode is COMMON_DEPENDENCIES (package registries available). No Docker daemon needed.
contribution_requirements: Follow strict TDD: write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass. Use CDK assertions pattern (Template.FromStack). Maintain least-privilege IAM. Use conventional commit messages.
key_patterns: Tests use JsonSerializer.Serialize(stateMachines.First().Value) and assert on serialized CloudFormation template content. States are verified by finding their serialized JSON representation. CatchProps/AddCatch pattern used for error handling. CustomState used for Polly (AWS SDK integration). Chain.Start() with .Next() for state machine definition. Options use UnsafeRelaxedJsonEscaping for inner-JSON assertions.
directory_structure: src/CdkBase/ - CDK stack code. src/CdkBase.Tests/ - xunit tests. src/CdkBase/lambda/process_audio/ - Python Lambda. docs/ - Architecture docs. .github/workflows/ - CI.
